def positive_csv_writer_flush_per_row():
    rule_id = "csv_writer_flush_per_row"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "csv.Writer flushes on each row instead of buffering a larger batch."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
